name: Badmona
flavorEn: She does not enjoy being underestimated; she enjoys correcting it slowly. The last smile usually belongs to her.

name: Anub'Ra
flavorEn: He weighs souls with one hand and paperwork with the other. Nobody knows which disappoints him more.

name: Astaroth
flavorEn: The grave gave him back with orders still warm in his skull. Since then, every arena bell sounds like someone digging too close.

name: Arlong
flavorEn: He has never understood why enemies scream before impact. To him, that is simply the part where the world becomes honest.

name: Red Riding Hood
portraitPath: /Users/chrisfalk/Library/CloudStorage/Dropbox/Chris/Olympiade der Welten/Mark VI Cardgame/Spieler/Red Riding Hood.jpg
